backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the complaint management system, handling complaint submission, status updates, officer management, attendance logging, and user profiles with role-based access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (logo display, admin/user login, complaint form, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure and responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (login, dashboard, complaint detail, officers, change-password) wrapped in QueryClientProvider and AuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Persistent app shell with a sticky navigation bar showing the UP Police logo, app branding, role-based nav links, user info, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login and non-admin users away from admin-only routes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides a React context and hook for authentication, supporting login/logout, OTP-based password change, and session persistence via localStorage with simulated user data.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity (ICP) authentication using AuthClient, managing login status, identity state, and session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including complaints, officers, attendance, and status updates via an actor interface.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes along with reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Defines English and Hindi translation strings for the entire application UI, exporting a translations map keyed by language code.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a printable HTML receipt for a complaint, including applicant info, status history, attendance log, and officer details, formatted for PDF output.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging (cn), formatting complaint numbers and timestamps, and returning status labels/colors for complaint statuses.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/ChangePassword.tsx: Multi-step page for changing a user's password, requiring OTP verification via mobile number before accepting and submitting the new password.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintDetail.tsx: Detail view for a single complaint that allows admins to assign officers, record attendance, update complaint status, and download attachments or a PDF receipt.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsDashboard.t: Admin dashboard displaying complaint statistics (total, pending, in-progress, resolved) with a filterable list of all complaints and navigation to individual complaint details.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with bilingual (English/Hindi) support that authenticates users and redirects them to role-appropriate routes after successful login.
frontend/src/pages/OfficersManagement.ts: Page for registering new officers and listing existing ones, with form validation and duplicate ID checking before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaint.tsx: React page component for submitting a complaint, featuring a bilingual form with fields for applicant details, file attachment, and camera capture, with validation and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/saffron color palettes, Devanagari font support, custom shadows, and a fade-in animation, plus the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the PS Sadar Bazar Application Box (UP Police complaint management app), listing its version, architectural notes, known issues, and all implemented features.
